meaning: n.牧歌,田园文学,田园诗adj.牧人的,田园生活的,牧师的
examples: The pastoral elegance of this little simile really catches us off guard.
When she first came to this pastoral area, she found life here a bit difficult to get used to.
He couldn't wait to write an epic poem about something more important than pastoral shepherd life.
The pastoral disappointments of the 1990s have led to a couple of alarming responses.
Others argue strong pastoral support at faith-based schools could provide a credible explanation for the results.
